sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75265" key="o)rnixolo/xos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρνῑχολόχος</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὄρνῑχος</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὄρνῑθ-χα</orth>, <sense id="n75265.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀρνιθ-, ὄρνις.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
